professional_summary: Enterprise B2B SaaS sales professional with 6 years of experience closing complex deals with Fortune 500 accounts. Consistent quota attainment at 115%+ of target with average deal sizes of $200K+ ACV. Expert in consultative selling, pipeline management, and building long-term account relationships using Salesforce, Outreach, and Gong.

work_experience.title: Senior Account Executive – Enterprise
bullets: Consistently exceeded quota at 118% attainment, closing $3.2M in new ARR in FY2024 with average $240K ACV deals
Managed full sales cycle from prospecting through contract negotiation and close for enterprise accounts 1,000+ employees
Built pipeline of $8M+ using LinkedIn Sales Navigator, Outreach sequences, and strategic account management
Leveraged Gong and Chorus conversation intelligence to refine solution selling approach, improving win rate by 22%
Partnered with customer success team to achieve 95% net revenue retention across 30-account portfolio

work_experience.title: Account Executive – Mid-Market
bullets: Exceeded annual quota by 125% in both years, generating $1.8M ARR through B2B sales to 50-500 employee companies
Maintained clean Salesforce CRM hygiene with 100% pipeline accuracy, used as model for 10-person sales team
Ran competitive displacement campaigns using consultative selling methodology, winning against 3 key competitors
Collaborated with BDR and SDR teams on outbound prospecting strategy, improving qualified pipeline by 40%

work_experience.title: Business Development Representative
bullets: Generated 45+ qualified SQLs per quarter through cold calling, email outreach, and social selling via ZoomInfo
Managed HubSpot CRM sequence campaigns achieving 32% email open rate and 8% response rate
Promoted to AE role within 12 months — fastest promotion in team history
Exceeded BDR quota by 140% in first full year, contributing to $2.4M in sourced pipeline

projects.name: SalesPlaybook Community
projects.description: Peer community for enterprise AEs sharing deal strategies, objection handling scripts, and comp benchmarking data
